# notificationType

**Instance Property**

The type of notification.

## Declaration

```swift
readonly attribute String notificationType;
```

## Discussion

Possible values are described in [doc://com.apple.cloudkitjs/documentation/CloudKitJS/CloudKit.Notification].

## Getting the Notification Type

- **isRecordZoneNotification**: A Boolean value indicating whether this notification is a [doc://com.apple.cloudkitjs/documentation/CloudKitJS/CloudKit.RecordZoneNotification] object.
